texto: If we are willing to spend hours on end to learn to play the piano operate a computer or fly an airplane it is sheer nonsense for us to imagine that we can learn the high art of getting guidance through communion with the Lord without being willing to set aside time for it.
explicacao: Citação de Paul Rees sobre passagem do tempo e prioridades. “If we are willing to spend hours on end to learn to play the piano operate a computer or fly an a…” articula reflexao, prayer, willing em registro de reflexao, com relevância para contextos como termino e reflexao.
